allow: Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const html = fs.readFileSync\('D:/Fishing project/index.html', 'utf8'\); const match = html.match\(/<script>\([\\s\\S]*\)<\\/script>/\); if \(match\) { const js = match[1]; try { new Function\(js\); console.log\('JS syntax OK'\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\('Syntax error:', e.message\); } } else { console.log\('No script found'\); }")
